questions.question: What is We2 and how does it help couples?
questions.answer: We2 is a digital relationship companion designed to help couples stay connected, deepen intimacy, and celebrate milestones together. Through features like a shared virtual pet, time capsules, daily prompts, and private messaging, We2 transforms everyday interactions into meaningful moments. Whether you live together or are separated by distance, We2 provides tools to nurture your bond and keep love growing every day.

questions.question: Is my data private and secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We2 uses end-to-end encryption for all private messages and stores data on secure servers compliant with GDPR and CCPA. Your personal information is never sold to third parties. You control what to share, and you can delete your data anytime from account settings. We also support two-factor authentication for added security.

questions.question: Can we use We2 in a long-distance relationship?
questions.answer: Yes — We2 was built with long-distance couples in mind. The app includes synchronized countdowns to next visit, virtual date ideas, a 'couple map' (only with consent), and the ability to leave voice notes or video messages. Many of our features, like the time capsule and shared pet, thrive on regular interaction, making distance feel smaller and love more tangible.

questions.question: How does the virtual pet work?
questions.answer: Your virtual pet grows based on how you and your partner interact on We2. Sending messages, completing shared challenges, adding memories, or reacting to each other's moments feeds and levels up your pet. Each pet has unique animations and can unlock special accessories as your relationship milestones increase. It's a playful, low-pressure way to visualize your connection's health.

questions.question: What are time capsules?
questions.answer: Time capsules are digital letters or media bundles you seal for a future date — your anniversary, a birthday, or any meaningful day. Both partners contribute content (text, photos, voice), and the capsule locks until the chosen date. On that day, it opens automatically, delivering a nostalgic surprise. It's a beautiful way to preserve memories and look forward to future moments together.

questions.question: How much does We2 cost?
questions.answer: We2 offers a free tier with basic features: messaging, pet bonding, and up to 3 time capsules. For unlimited time capsules, advanced analytics, and priority support, we have a premium plan at $4.99/month or $39.99/year. We also have a lifetime option for $89.99. All prices are in USD and include applicable taxes where required.

questions.question: Can I cancel my membership?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account dashboard. For monthly or yearly plans, cancellation stops future billing, and you keep access until the end of the current billing period. No cancellation fees. If you encounter issues, our support team is available 24/7 to assist.

questions.question: How do I connect with my partner?
questions.answer: After both partners create an account, one sends a connection request using the partner's email or a unique invite link. The other accepts, and your couple space is created. From then on, all activities, pets, and time capsules are shared. We2 is designed for exclusive couples, fostering commitment and focus.

questions.question: Is there a community feature?
questions.answer: Yes! We2 has a 'Couple Circle' — a private space for each couple to optionally join public interest groups (long-distance tips, anniversary ideas, relationship advice). All community interactions are anonymous by default, and you can opt-out entirely. We believe in safe, supportive communities that respect privacy.

questions.question: What payment methods are accepted?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Google Pay, and Apple Pay. For annual and lifetime plans, we also support bank transfers (US only) upon request. Payments are processed securely through Stripe and PayPal, with no hidden fees.
